Video.summary: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: Witness an intense showdown in Day 3, Tie 2 of the World Pickleball League Season 2 as the Chennai Super Champs face off against the home favorites, Mumbai Pickle Power, at the Jio World Garden. This episode features a mix of elite athleticism and star-studded entertainment, starting with a special appearance by legendary Bollywood choreographer Bosco Martis, who discusses the rhythmic similarities between dance and pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: David Weinbach and Altaf Merchant take on Dayne Gingrich and Mircea Morariu in this Men's Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match - S01E26

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match - S01E26

Video.summary: Dylan Frazier and Ritchie Tuazon meet Irina Tereschenko and Connor Pardoe in a high-stakes mixed doubles match at Picklebowl 2023. Set against the backdrop of this annual charity event, the match features four seasoned competitors known for their precision, quick reflexes, and court awareness. Expect fast-paced exchanges, smart teamwork, and big momentum swings as both teams battle for bragging rights and a good cause. Blending professional play with the spirited energy of Picklebowl, this match is a crowd favorite you won’t want to miss.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Video.summary: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Video.summary: Experience the tactical intensity of the World Pickleball League as the Rajasthan Titans look to mount a comeback against the surging Hyderabad Superstars. This episode spotlights a generational clash in the men's singles match between Rajasthan’s Jack Foster and Hyderabad’s Marcelo Jardim, a 51-year-old former world No. 3 in padel and a true legend of racquet sports.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Singles - Gold Medal

Video.summary: Welcome back to the mixed pro doubles semifinal from Naples, Florida. This intense match features the teams of Rianna Livornese and Riley Bohnert against Marty Dancuart and Cody Braverman. The match is a thrilling display of skill, including powerful drives and dinks. The broadcast highlights a "golden pickle" moment and the commentator, Gigi LeMaster, provides expert insight into the strategic play of both teams as they battle for a spot in the final.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Video.summary: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Video.summary: This championship game highlights the strategic play, including lobs and speed-ups, as both teams battle for the gold. A key dynamic of this match is that Courter and Carter had the advantage of playing under the shaded court conditions just before, while Dawson and Williams were coming from outside. Jen Dawson is noted as being a seasoned player on this court, having a triple crown in the Senior Pro divisions.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Video.summary: Tuesday Night Pickleball heats up as the Surprise Stingers go head-to-head with the Scottsdale Scorchers at The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health. Expect fiery team chemistry, quick-paced exchanges, and a crowd-ready atmosphere in this Arizona Pickleball League showdown.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL

Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL

Video.summary: December 13, 2022 - Live from The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health, it's Tuesday Night Pickleball
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 13 2022 - All Stars Mixed Doubles

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 13 2022 - All Stars Mixed Doubles
Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 13 2022 - All Stars Mixed Doubles
Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 13 2022 - All Stars Mixed Doubles

Video.summary: Set at the scenic Troubadour Golf and Field Club in Nashville, TN, this exhibition match brings a mix of celebrity flair and friendly competition to the pickleball court. Olympian Shawn Johnson and her husband Andrew East take on TV host Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a lighthearted yet tightly contested match that goes down to the wire. With Shawn still learning the ropes (and the rules), and Andrew channeling his athletic instincts, the duo puts up an impressive fight against the more experienced Kennedy and Burrows. It’s a fast-paced, fun-filled match full of laughs, learning moments, and great rallies—perfect for fans of lifestyle sports and celebrity matchups.
Video.title: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Image.alt: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the high-stakes Women's Doubles Open Final featuring Team England against Team Spain. Defending champions Spain, represented by the powerhouse duo of Sabrina Mendez and Glauka Carvajal, look to secure their second consecutive title against the English pair of Thaddea Lock and Katy Morris.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group A - 1

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group A - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group A - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group A - 1

Video.summary: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
